_publications._publicationTitle: Interpreting mammalian target of rapamycin and cell growth inhibition in a genetically engineered mouse model of Nf1-deficient astrocytes.

_contextSnippet: STAT3 inhibition was only observed in the brain at the 5 and 20 mg/kg/day doses
resourceName: Nf1 GFAP CKO mice (Nf1 flox/flox; GFAP-Cre)
details: STAT3 inhibition was only observed at 5 and 20 mg/kg/day rapamycin doses, consistent with phospho-S6 and phospho-4EBP1 results
